SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.electrolyzer

Class Electrolyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.process.SimulationBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.electrolyzer.Electrolyzer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Runnable, ProcessEquipmentInterface, ProcessElementInterface, SimulationInterface, NamedInterface
public class Electrolyzer extends ProcessEquipmentBaseClass

Electrolyzer unit converting water to hydrogen and oxygen using electrical energy.

Author:
esol
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Electrolyzer.OperationMode
    Operating mode of the electrolyzer.

    Description

    Active area per cell (cm2).

    auxiliaryLoadFraction
    Auxiliary (pump, thermal management) load as a fraction of stack power (>= 0).

    Available electrical (AC, system-level) power for the most recent run (W).

    cellVoltage

    Current density (A/cm2), used when ivCharacteristic is non-null.

    Electrical power curtailed because available power exceeded rated power (W).

    Faradaic (current) efficiency, fraction of electrons that split water (0..1).

    Maximum ramp rate as a fraction of rated power per second (0 = unlimited).

    System power actually delivered after the previous transient step (W); negative = unset.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private double
    cellVoltageAt(double j, double temperatureK)
    Compute the cell voltage at a given current density and temperature, using the attached I-V characteristic when present and the fixed cell voltage otherwise.
    private double
    currentDensityUpperBound()
    Upper bound for current density used in sizing and inversion: the nominal current density when set, otherwise the technology default, otherwise zero (unbounded).
    double
    getActiveCellArea()
    Get the active area per cell.
    double
    getAuxiliaryLoadFraction()
    Get the auxiliary load fraction.
    double
    getAvailablePower()
    Get the available electrical power used in the most recent run.
    double
    getCellVoltage()
    Gets the cell voltage.
    double
    getCurrentDensity()
    Get the operating current density.
    double
    getCurtailedPower()
    Get the electrical power curtailed in the most recent run because the available power exceeded the rated power.
    double
    getFaradaicEfficiency()
    Get the faradaic (current) efficiency.
    double
    getHydrogenCompressionPower()
    Estimate the ideal isothermal compression power required to raise the hydrogen product from the stack pressure to the delivery pressure: W = n R T ln(P2 / P1).
    double
    getHydrogenDeliveryPressure()
    Get the hydrogen delivery pressure.
    StreamInterface
    getHydrogenOutStream()
    Getter for the field hydrogenOutStream.
    ElectrolyzerIVCharacteristic
    getIVCharacteristic()
    Get the attached I-V characteristic.
    double
    getMassBalance(String unit)
    getMassBalance.
    double
    getMaxRampRate()
    Get the maximum ramp rate.
    double
    getMinimumLoadFraction()
    Get the minimum load fraction.
    double
    getNominalCurrentDensity()
    Get the nominal current density.
    int
    getNumberOfCells()
    Get the number of cells in the stack.
    double
    getOperatingPower()
    Get the system power actually delivered after the previous transient step.
    Electrolyzer.OperationMode
    getOperationMode()
    Get the operating mode.
    StreamInterface
    getOxygenOutStream()
    Getter for the field oxygenOutStream.
    double
    getRatedPower()
    Get the rated (nameplate) stack power.
    double
    getRectifierEfficiency()
    Get the rectifier efficiency.
    double
    getSpecificEnergyConsumption_kWh_per_kg_H2()
    Get the specific energy consumption in kWh per kg of hydrogen produced, based on the most recent run(UUID).
    double
    getStackActiveArea()
    Get the total stack active area, preferring an explicit value over activeCellArea * numberOfCells.
    double
    getStackCurrent()
    Get the total stack current from the most recent run.
    double
    getStackPower()
    Get the stack electrical power computed by the last run(UUID).
    double
    getStandbyPowerFraction()
    Get the standby power fraction.
    double
    getSystemPower()
    Get the system-level electrical power consumed in the most recent run, including rectifier losses, auxiliary loads, and (in standby) the standby draw.
    double
    getSystemSpecificEnergyConsumption_kWh_per_kg_H2()
    Get the system-level specific energy consumption in kWh per kg of hydrogen, based on the most recent run.
    ElectrolyzerTechnology
    getTechnology()
    Get the electrolyzer technology, or null if not set.
    double
    getWasteHeat()
    Get the stack waste heat from the most recent run, computed from the overpotential above the thermoneutral voltage: Q = max(0, V_cell - V_tn) * I_stack.
    double
    getWaterConsumption(String unit)
    Get the stoichiometric water consumption from the most recent run (1 mol H2O per mol H2).
    boolean
    isStandby()
    Whether the most recent run left the stack in standby (below minimum turndown).
    void
    run(UUID id)
    In this method all thermodynamic and unit operations will be calculated in a steady state calculation.
    void
    runTransient(double dt, UUID id)
    runTransient

    Set the active area per cell.

    setAuxiliaryLoadFraction(double auxiliaryLoadFraction)
    Set the auxiliary (pump, thermal management) load as a fraction of stack power.

    Set the available electrical (AC, system-level) power and switch the unit into power-driven mode.

    Sets the cell voltage.

    Set the operating current density (A/cm2).

    Set the faradaic (current) efficiency.

    Set the hydrogen delivery pressure.

    Setter for the field inletStream.

    Attach an I-V characteristic.

    setMaxRampRate(double maxRampRate)
    Set the maximum ramp rate as a fraction of rated power per second.
    void
    setMinimumLoadFraction(double minimumLoadFraction)
    Set the minimum load as a fraction of rated power.
    void
    setNominalCurrentDensity(double nominalCurrentDensity)
    Set the nominal current density used for sizing and as the inversion upper bound.

    setNumberOfCells(int numberOfCells)
    Set the number of cells in the stack.
    void
    setOperationMode(Electrolyzer.OperationMode operationMode)
    Set the operating mode.
    private void
    setProductStreams(double hydrogenFlow, double oxygenFlow, double hydrogenPressure, double oxygenPressure, double temperatureK, UUID id)
    Set the hydrogen and oxygen product stream flow rates, pressures and temperature, and run them.
    void
    setRatedPower(double ratedPower)
    Set the rated (nameplate) stack power.
    void
    setRectifierEfficiency(double rectifierEfficiency)
    Set the rectifier (AC/DC) efficiency.
    void
    setStackActiveArea(double stackActiveArea)
    Set the total stack active area explicitly.
    void
    setStandbyPowerFraction(double standbyPowerFraction)
    Set the standby auxiliary draw as a fraction of rated power while idling.
    void
    setTechnology(ElectrolyzerTechnology technology)
    Set the electrolyzer technology.
    void
    sizeStack(double ratedPowerW)
    Size the stack active area for a rated power, using the nominal current density (technology default if not set explicitly) and the inlet temperature.
    void
    sizeStack(double ratedPowerW, double nominalJ, double temperatureK)
    Size the stack active area for a rated power at a nominal current density and temperature so that ratedPower = nominalJ * area * V_cell(nominalJ, T).
    private double
    solveCurrentDensityForStackPower(double targetStackPower, double temperatureK)
    Solve the stack-power balance P = j * A * V_cell(j, T) for the current density.
    private double
    stackPowerFromSystem(double systemPowerW)
    Convert a system (AC) power budget into the stack (DC) power it can deliver.
    private double
    systemPowerFromStack(double stackPowerW)
    Convert a stack (DC) power into the corresponding system (AC) power, adding rectifier losses and auxiliary loads.

      private static final double MW_H2
      Molar mass of hydrogen (kg/mol).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • technology

      private ElectrolyzerTechnology technology
      Selected technology. Null preserves the original (1.23 V) behaviour.

    • ivCharacteristic

      private ElectrolyzerIVCharacteristic ivCharacteristic
      Optional polarisation model. When set, drives cellVoltage from current density.

    • currentDensity

      private double currentDensity
      Current density (A/cm2), used when ivCharacteristic is non-null.

    • faradaicEfficiency

      private double faradaicEfficiency
      Faradaic (current) efficiency, fraction of electrons that split water (0..1).

    • stackPower

      private double stackPower
      Stack power computed by the most recent run(java.util.UUID) (W).

    • operationMode

      private Electrolyzer.OperationMode operationMode
      Selected operating mode. Default Electrolyzer.OperationMode.WATER_FEED for backward compatibility.

    • activeCellArea

      private double activeCellArea
      Active area per cell (cm2).

    • numberOfCells

      private int numberOfCells
      Number of cells in series in the stack.

    • stackActiveArea

      private double stackActiveArea
      Explicit total active area (cm2). Overrides activeCellArea * numberOfCells when set.

    • ratedPower

      private double ratedPower
      Rated (nameplate) stack power (W).

    • nominalCurrentDensity

      private double nominalCurrentDensity
      Nominal current density used for sizing and as the inversion upper bound (A/cm2).

    • availablePower

      private double availablePower
      Available electrical (AC, system-level) power for the most recent run (W).

    • curtailedPower

      private double curtailedPower
      Electrical power curtailed because available power exceeded rated power (W).

    • stackCurrent

      private double stackCurrent
      Total stack current from the most recent run (A).

    • minimumLoadFraction

      private double minimumLoadFraction
      Minimum load as a fraction of rated power; below this the stack goes to standby (0..1).

    • standbyPowerFraction

      private double standbyPowerFraction
      Standby auxiliary draw as a fraction of rated power while idling (0..1).

    • standby

      private boolean standby
      True if the most recent run left the stack in standby (no production).

    • maxRampRate

      private double maxRampRate
      Maximum ramp rate as a fraction of rated power per second (0 = unlimited).

    • operatingPower

      private double operatingPower
      System power actually delivered after the previous transient step (W); negative = unset.

    • rectifierEfficiency

      private double rectifierEfficiency
      Rectifier (AC/DC) efficiency (0..1].

    • auxiliaryLoadFraction

      private double auxiliaryLoadFraction
      Auxiliary (pump, thermal management) load as a fraction of stack power (>= 0).

    • V_THERMONEUTRAL

      private static final double V_THERMONEUTRAL
      Thermoneutral voltage (V), HHV basis at 25 C (Larminie & Dicks).

      inletStream - water inlet stream

      public void setInletStream(StreamInterface inletStream)

      Setter for the field inletStream.

      Getter for the field hydrogenOutStream.

      Returns:
      hydrogen product stream

      public double getCellVoltage()
      Gets the cell voltage.
      Returns:
      cell voltage in V

    • setCellVoltage

      public void setCellVoltage(double cellVoltage)
      Sets the cell voltage.
      Parameters:
      cellVoltage - cell voltage in V

      Getter for the field oxygenOutStream.

      Returns:
      oxygen product stream

    • getMassBalance

      public double getMassBalance(String unit)

      getMassBalance.

      Specified by:
      getMassBalance in interface ProcessEquipmentInterface
      Overrides:
      getMassBalance in class ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
      Parameters:
      unit - a String object
      Returns:
      a double

    • run

      public void run(UUID id)

      In this method all thermodynamic and unit operations will be calculated in a steady state calculation.

      Parameters:
      id - UUID

    • setProductStreams

      private void setProductStreams(double hydrogenFlow, double oxygenFlow, double hydrogenPressure, double oxygenPressure, double temperatureK, UUID id)
      Set the hydrogen and oxygen product stream flow rates, pressures and temperature, and run them.
      Parameters:
      hydrogenFlow - hydrogen molar flow (mole/sec)
      oxygenFlow - oxygen molar flow (mole/sec)
      hydrogenPressure - hydrogen delivery pressure (bara)
      oxygenPressure - oxygen delivery pressure (bara)
      temperatureK - product temperature (K)
      id - calculation identifier

    • runTransient

      public void runTransient(double dt, UUID id)

      runTransient

      This method calculates thermodynamic and unit operations using difference equations if available and calculateSteadyState is true. Use setCalculateSteadyState to set the parameter. Sets calc identifier UUID.
      Parameters:
      dt - Delta time [s]
      id - Calculation identifier

    • setTechnology

      public void setTechnology(ElectrolyzerTechnology technology)
      Set the electrolyzer technology. Applies the technology's default cell voltage, current density, and faradaic efficiency unless they have already been set explicitly. Does not override an already-attached I-V characteristic.
      Parameters:
      technology - technology selector

    • getTechnology

      public ElectrolyzerTechnology getTechnology()
      Get the electrolyzer technology, or null if not set.
      Returns:
      technology, or null

    • setIVCharacteristic

      public void setIVCharacteristic(ElectrolyzerIVCharacteristic ivCharacteristic)
      Attach an I-V characteristic. When set, the cell voltage is recomputed during run(UUID) from the current density and feed temperature.
      Parameters:
      ivCharacteristic - polarisation model, or null to disable

    • getIVCharacteristic

      public ElectrolyzerIVCharacteristic getIVCharacteristic()
      Get the attached I-V characteristic.
      Returns:
      polarisation model, or null if none

    • setCurrentDensity

      public void setCurrentDensity(double currentDensity)
      Set the operating current density (A/cm2). Used together with an attached I-V characteristic to compute the cell voltage during run(UUID).
      Parameters:
      currentDensity - current density (A/cm2), must be non-negative

    • getCurrentDensity

      public double getCurrentDensity()
      Get the operating current density.
      Returns:
      current density (A/cm2)

    • setFaradaicEfficiency

      public void setFaradaicEfficiency(double faradaicEfficiency)
      Set the faradaic (current) efficiency.
      Parameters:
      faradaicEfficiency - fraction of stack current that actually splits water, 0..1

    • getFaradaicEfficiency

      public double getFaradaicEfficiency()
      Get the faradaic (current) efficiency.
      Returns:
      faradaic efficiency, 0..1

    • getStackPower

      public double getStackPower()
      Get the stack electrical power computed by the last run(UUID).
      Returns:
      stack power (W)

    • getSpecificEnergyConsumption_kWh_per_kg_H2

      public double getSpecificEnergyConsumption_kWh_per_kg_H2()
      Get the specific energy consumption in kWh per kg of hydrogen produced, based on the most recent run(UUID). Returns 0.0 if no hydrogen has been produced.
      Returns:
      specific energy consumption (kWh / kg H2)

    • setOperationMode

      public void setOperationMode(Electrolyzer.OperationMode operationMode)
      Set the operating mode.
      Parameters:
      operationMode - Electrolyzer.OperationMode.WATER_FEED or Electrolyzer.OperationMode.POWER

    • getOperationMode

      public Electrolyzer.OperationMode getOperationMode()
      Get the operating mode.
      Returns:
      operating mode

    • setAvailablePower

      public void setAvailablePower(double power)
      Set the available electrical (AC, system-level) power and switch the unit into power-driven mode. During run(UUID) the current density and water demand are computed so the stack consumes this power, subject to balance-of-plant losses, the minimum turndown, and curtailment above rated power. Requires stack geometry (see sizeStack(double) or setStackActiveArea(double)).
      Parameters:
      power - available electrical power (W), must be non-negative

    • getAvailablePower

      public double getAvailablePower()
      Get the available electrical power used in the most recent run.
      Returns:
      available power (W)

    • getCurtailedPower

      public double getCurtailedPower()
      Get the electrical power curtailed in the most recent run because the available power exceeded the rated power.
      Returns:
      curtailed power (W)

    • getStackCurrent

      public double getStackCurrent()
      Get the total stack current from the most recent run.
      Returns:
      stack current (A)

    • cellVoltageAt

      private double cellVoltageAt(double j, double temperatureK)
      Compute the cell voltage at a given current density and temperature, using the attached I-V characteristic when present and the fixed cell voltage otherwise.
      Parameters:
      j - current density (A/cm2)
      temperatureK - temperature (K)
      Returns:
      cell voltage (V)

    • solveCurrentDensityForStackPower

      private double solveCurrentDensityForStackPower(double targetStackPower, double temperatureK)
      Solve the stack-power balance P = j * A * V_cell(j, T) for the current density. With no I-V characteristic the cell voltage is constant and the solution is explicit; otherwise a bounded bisection is used (the balance is monotonically increasing in current density).
      Parameters:
      targetStackPower - target stack power (W)
      temperatureK - temperature (K)
      Returns:
      current density (A/cm2)

    • currentDensityUpperBound

      private double currentDensityUpperBound()
      Upper bound for current density used in sizing and inversion: the nominal current density when set, otherwise the technology default, otherwise zero (unbounded).
      Returns:
      current-density upper bound (A/cm2), or 0 if unknown

    • setActiveCellArea

      public void setActiveCellArea(double activeCellArea)
      Set the active area per cell.
      Parameters:
      activeCellArea - active area per cell (cm2), must be positive

    • getActiveCellArea

      public double getActiveCellArea()
      Get the active area per cell.
      Returns:
      active area per cell (cm2)

    • setNumberOfCells

      public void setNumberOfCells(int numberOfCells)
      Set the number of cells in the stack.
      Parameters:
      numberOfCells - number of cells, must be positive

    • getNumberOfCells

      public int getNumberOfCells()
      Get the number of cells in the stack.
      Returns:
      number of cells

    • setStackActiveArea

      public void setStackActiveArea(double stackActiveArea)
      Set the total stack active area explicitly. Overrides activeCellArea * numberOfCells.
      Parameters:
      stackActiveArea - total active area (cm2), must be positive

    • getStackActiveArea

      public double getStackActiveArea()
      Get the total stack active area, preferring an explicit value over activeCellArea * numberOfCells.
      Returns:
      total active area (cm2), or 0 if not configured

    • setRatedPower

      public void setRatedPower(double ratedPower)
      Set the rated (nameplate) stack power.
      Parameters:
      ratedPower - rated power (W), must be positive

    • getRatedPower

      public double getRatedPower()
      Get the rated (nameplate) stack power.
      Returns:
      rated power (W)

    • setNominalCurrentDensity

      public void setNominalCurrentDensity(double nominalCurrentDensity)
      Set the nominal current density used for sizing and as the inversion upper bound.
      Parameters:
      nominalCurrentDensity - nominal current density (A/cm2), must be positive

    • getNominalCurrentDensity

      public double getNominalCurrentDensity()
      Get the nominal current density.
      Returns:
      nominal current density (A/cm2)

    • sizeStack

      public void sizeStack(double ratedPowerW)
      Size the stack active area for a rated power, using the nominal current density (technology default if not set explicitly) and the inlet temperature.
      Parameters:
      ratedPowerW - rated power (W), must be positive

    • sizeStack

      public void sizeStack(double ratedPowerW, double nominalJ, double temperatureK)
      Size the stack active area for a rated power at a nominal current density and temperature so that ratedPower = nominalJ * area * V_cell(nominalJ, T).
      Parameters:
      ratedPowerW - rated power (W), must be positive
      nominalJ - nominal current density (A/cm2), must be positive
      temperatureK - temperature (K), must be positive

    • setMinimumLoadFraction

      public void setMinimumLoadFraction(double minimumLoadFraction)
      Set the minimum load as a fraction of rated power. Below this, power-driven runs leave the stack in standby with no production.
      Parameters:
      minimumLoadFraction - minimum load fraction (0..1)

    • getMinimumLoadFraction

      public double getMinimumLoadFraction()
      Get the minimum load fraction.
      Returns:
      minimum load fraction (0..1)

    • setStandbyPowerFraction

      public void setStandbyPowerFraction(double standbyPowerFraction)
      Set the standby auxiliary draw as a fraction of rated power while idling.
      Parameters:
      standbyPowerFraction - standby power fraction (0..1)

    • getStandbyPowerFraction

      public double getStandbyPowerFraction()
      Get the standby power fraction.
      Returns:
      standby power fraction (0..1)

    • isStandby

      public boolean isStandby()
      Whether the most recent run left the stack in standby (below minimum turndown).
      Returns:
      true if in standby

    • setMaxRampRate

      public void setMaxRampRate(double maxRampRate)
      Set the maximum ramp rate as a fraction of rated power per second. Applied during runTransient(double, UUID) in power-driven mode. Zero disables the limit.
      Parameters:
      maxRampRate - maximum ramp rate (fraction of rated power per second), must be non-negative

    • getMaxRampRate

      public double getMaxRampRate()
      Get the maximum ramp rate.
      Returns:
      maximum ramp rate (fraction of rated power per second)

    • getOperatingPower

      public double getOperatingPower()
      Get the system power actually delivered after the previous transient step.
      Returns:
      operating power (W); negative if no transient step has run

    • setRectifierEfficiency

      public void setRectifierEfficiency(double rectifierEfficiency)
      Set the rectifier (AC/DC) efficiency.
      Parameters:
      rectifierEfficiency - rectifier efficiency in (0,1]

    • getRectifierEfficiency

      public double getRectifierEfficiency()
      Get the rectifier efficiency.
      Returns:
      rectifier efficiency (0,1]

    • setAuxiliaryLoadFraction

      public void setAuxiliaryLoadFraction(double auxiliaryLoadFraction)
      Set the auxiliary (pump, thermal management) load as a fraction of stack power.
      Parameters:
      auxiliaryLoadFraction - auxiliary load fraction, must be non-negative

    • getAuxiliaryLoadFraction

      public double getAuxiliaryLoadFraction()
      Get the auxiliary load fraction.
      Returns:
      auxiliary load fraction

    • systemPowerFromStack

      private double systemPowerFromStack(double stackPowerW)
      Convert a stack (DC) power into the corresponding system (AC) power, adding rectifier losses and auxiliary loads.
      Parameters:
      stackPowerW - stack power (W)
      Returns:
      system power (W)

    • stackPowerFromSystem

      private double stackPowerFromSystem(double systemPowerW)
      Convert a system (AC) power budget into the stack (DC) power it can deliver.
      Parameters:
      systemPowerW - system power (W)
      Returns:
      stack power (W)

    • getSystemPower

      public double getSystemPower()
      Get the system-level electrical power consumed in the most recent run, including rectifier losses, auxiliary loads, and (in standby) the standby draw.
      Returns:
      system power (W)

    • getSystemSpecificEnergyConsumption_kWh_per_kg_H2

      public double getSystemSpecificEnergyConsumption_kWh_per_kg_H2()
      Get the system-level specific energy consumption in kWh per kg of hydrogen, based on the most recent run. Includes rectifier and auxiliary losses. Returns 0.0 if no hydrogen was produced.
      Returns:
      system specific energy consumption (kWh / kg H2)

    • getWasteHeat

      public double getWasteHeat()
      Get the stack waste heat from the most recent run, computed from the overpotential above the thermoneutral voltage: Q = max(0, V_cell - V_tn) * I_stack.
      Returns:
      waste heat (W)

    • getWaterConsumption

      public double getWaterConsumption(String unit)
      Get the stoichiometric water consumption from the most recent run (1 mol H2O per mol H2).
      Parameters:
      unit - one of "mole/sec", "kg/sec", "kg/hr"
      Returns:
      water consumption in the requested unit

    • setHydrogenDeliveryPressure

      public void setHydrogenDeliveryPressure(double hydrogenDeliveryPressure)
      Set the hydrogen delivery pressure. When positive, the hydrogen product leaves at this pressure; zero keeps the inlet pressure.
      Parameters:
      hydrogenDeliveryPressure - delivery pressure (bara), must be non-negative

    • getHydrogenDeliveryPressure

      public double getHydrogenDeliveryPressure()
      Get the hydrogen delivery pressure.
      Returns:
      delivery pressure (bara); 0 means the inlet pressure is used

    • getHydrogenCompressionPower

      public double getHydrogenCompressionPower()
      Estimate the ideal isothermal compression power required to raise the hydrogen product from the stack pressure to the delivery pressure: W = n R T ln(P2 / P1). Returns 0.0 when the delivery pressure does not exceed the stack pressure.
      Returns:
      ideal compression power (W)
